species.citation: Jebb & Cheek , Nordic J. Bot. 31 (2013) 153; Type: McGregor 32313 (US, holo; B, K, PNH, iso), Panay, Antique, Marilison (Mararison) Island. ≠ Nepenthes blancoi auct. non Blume ; Macfarl. in Engl., Pflanzenreich 36 (1908) 40; PJS 33 (1927) 129.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. CULION, CUYO ARCHIPELAGO, MARARISON, PANAY (photos).
species.notes: In stunted shrublands and grasslands on ultramafic substrates (Mararison). 0-20m.

species.citation: Jebb & Cheek , Phytotaxa 151 (2013) 29 ; Cortez et al., Check List 19 (2023) 988; Type: Ramos & Pascasioin BS 34501B, (UC, holo; K, photo), Mindanao: Surigao, Apr-1919.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Surigao, SIARGAO.

species.citation: H.Nuytemans, W.Suarez & Calaramo , Plants (Basel) 5 (2016) 23; Type: M. Calaramo 2288 (HNUL, holo & iso), Luzon: Ilocos Norte.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Ilocos Norte.

species.citation: Blanco , Fl. Filip., 1st Ed. (1837) 805 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 214; Macfarlane, PJS 33 (1927) 136; Romeroso et al., J. Asia-Pacific biodiv. 17 (2024) 12; Type: Fenix BS 26726 (US, photo, K, neo; BO, SING, isoneo), Luzon: Ilocos Norte, Burgos, 23 to 25-Nov-1916. = Nepenthes brachycarpa Merr. , PJS 10c (1915) 306; Type: Merrill 9588 (L, NY, iso), Palawan: Silanga, May-1913. = Nepenthes blancoi Blume , Mus. Bot. 2 (1856) 10; Type: Williams 1012 (US, K, PNH, neo; PNH lost, NY, isoneo), Luzon: Benguet, Trinidad.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. DINAGAT (photos), ?HOMONHON, LUZON: Abra (photos), Apayao (photos), Aurora (photos), Benguet, Ifugao, Ilocos Norte, Isabela (photos), Mountain Province, Nueva Vizcaya, Quezon, Zambales, MINDANAO: Davao Oriental (photos), ?SAMAR (photos).
species.notes: In open, disturbed areas in the highlands of Luzon, often in mafic and ultramafic substrates, occurring in both closed and open vegetation types, growing terrestrially or as an epiphyte. Pelser (11-May-13): it can be questioned if the neotype of Nepenthes blancoi Blume is conspecific with Blanco's plant, because Blanco's description was very brief and general and the neotype was selected from a different area than that mentioned by Blanco (Agoo, Pangasinan). 500m and above.

species.citation: Amoroso & Lagunday , Philipp. J. Syst. Biol. 11 (2018) 15; Type: V.B. Amoroso, N.E. Lagunday & F.P. Coritico s.n. (CMUH10856, holo), Mindanao: Davao Oriental, Mt Hamiguitan Range Widlife Sanctuary Expansion Site, Brgy Luzon, 345m, 12-Oct-2016.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Davao Oriental.

species.citation: Jebb & Cheek , Phytotaxa 100 (2013) 59; Type: Ramos & Edanõ 45690 (K, holo; NY, UC, US, iso), Luzon: Mt Alzapan, 7-Jun-1925.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Aurora.
species.notes: Only known from the types (4 sheets), representing three individual plants at most. Submontane mossy forest. 1000m (photos) to 1800m.

species.citation: Jebb & Cheek , Blumea 42 (1997) 19 ; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 15 (2001) 34; Type: Argent & Reynoso 89119 (K, holo; PNH, iso), Sibuyan: Mt Giting-giting, above Magdiwang on ridge leading to Mayo’s Peak, 1400m, 27-Aug-1989.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. SIBUYAN.
species.notes: Subalpine shrubbery with smooth wind-clipped canopy 30cm tall on a ridge of ultramafic rocks. 1400-1900m.

species.citation: Jebb & Cheek , Blumea 59 (2014) 147; Type: Argent & Reynoso 8936 (K, holo; E, PNH, iso), Sibuyan: Magdiwang, 16-Aug-1989.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. SIBUYAN.
species.notes: In forests on ultramafic rock; distributed widely on the middle slopes and surrounding foothills of Mt Guiting-Guiting. 750m.

species.citation: A.S.Rob., S.McPherson & V.B.Heinrich , Bot. J. Linn. Soc. 159 (2009) 196; Type: A. Robinson AR001 (PPC, holo), Palawan: Mt Victoria.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. PALAWAN.

species.citation: Tandang & Cheek , Phytotaxa 222 (2015) 146; Type: Tandang 1727 with Pelser & Barcelona (PNH, holo; K, iso), Luzon: Sierra Madre Mountain range, Aurora, 22-Feb-2014.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Aurora.

species.citation: K.Kondo , Bull. Torrey Bot. Club 96 (1969) 653 ; Jebb & Cheek, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 15 (2001) 38; Fernando et al., Forest Flora of Dinagat (2017) 68; Type: Kondo 11514 (NCU, holo; KC, Nagoya, iso), Mindanao: Surigao del Norte, between Jayanggabon & Carrascal, 800m, 14-Apr-1968. = Nepenthes globamphora Sh.Kurata & Toyosh. , Gard. Bull. Singapore 26 (1972) 155; Type: S. Kurata & M. Toyoshima 1128 (Nippon Dental College, holo), Mindanao: Surigao del Sur, Mt Legaspi, E slope, 22-Aug-1965.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. DINAGAT, MINDANAO: Surigao del Norte, Surigao del Sur.
species.notes: On ultramafic substrates in marshy forests, forest margins and shrublands at relatively low altitudes. 0-800m.

species.citation: Mast. , Gard. Chron., 3rd Ser. 6 (1889) 492 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 214; Macfarlane, PJS 33 (1927) 134; Sh. Kurata & Toyoshima, Gard. Bull. Sing. 26 (1972) 155; Jebb & Cheek, Blumea 42 (1997) 28; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 15 (2001) 47; Type: J. Veitch & Sons, s.n. (K, lecto), cultivated from material collected by David Burke from Mindoro. = Nepenthes burkei var. excellens Marshall , J. Roy. Hort. Soc. 12 (1890) 114. = Nepenthes burkei var. prolifica Mast. , Gard. Chron., 3rd Ser. 8 (1890) 184.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDORO, PANAY.

species.citation: Lagunday & Amoroso , Philipp. J. Syst. Biol. 13 (2019) 39; Type: Lagunday N.E. 0003 (PNH, holo; CMUH, iso), Mindanao: Bukidnon, Pantaron Range, San Fernando, Mt Malimumu, 18-Aug-2015.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Misamis Oriental (photos).

species.citation: Lagunday & Amoroso , Phytotaxa 554 (2022) 286; Type: Lagunday s.n. (PNH, holo; CMUH, iso), Mindanao: Davao de Oro, Maragusan, Mt Candalaga, Tropical Upper Montane Rainforest, 3-May-2021.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Davao de Oro.

species.citation: Gronem., Coritico, Micheler, Marwinski, Acil & Amoroso , New Nepenthes 1 (2011) 413; Type: F. Coritico & V. Amoroso s.n. (CMUH00007378, holo), Mindanao: Bukidnon, Mount Kiamo, trail from Brgy Kibalabag (Malaybalay City), 16-May-2011.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Bukidnon.

species.citation: Jebb & Cheek , Phytotaxa 151 (2013) 30; Type: Cid 8 (L, holo; K, photo; PNH, iso), Mindanao: Bukidnon, Dalvangan, 26-Dec-1952.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Bukidnon.

species.citation: Merr. ex Macfarl. , Pflanzenr. (Engler) IV (111) (1908) 51 ; Macfarlane, PJS 33 (1927) 131; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 214; Type: Copeland 1033 (US), Mindanao: Davao, Mt Apo, Apr-1904.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. CAMIGUIN, MINDANAO: Cotabato (photos), Davao del Sur.
species.notes: Lower pitchers similar to Nepenthes alata though comparatively more elongated, upper pitchers strongly infundibular; also differing from it by its epiphytic habit. In lower and upper montane forest on several mountains in southeast Mindanao, either terrestrially or epiphytically. Sometimes cultivated. 1100-3000m.

species.citation: Marwinski, Coritico, Wistuba, Micheler, Gronem., Gieray & Amoroso , Plants (Basel) 3 (2014) 289; Type: T. Gronemeyer & F. Coritico s.n. (CMUH00008547, holo), Mindanao: Bukidnon, Pantaron mountain range, Malaybalay City, Brgy St. Peter, 15-Aug-2012.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Bukidnon.

species.citation: Macfarl. , Pflanzenr. (Engler) IV (111) (1908) 57 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 215; Macfarlane, PJS 33 (1927) 134; Type: FB 3891 Curran (PNH, holo, lost), Palawan: Mt Pulgar summit, 1300m.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. PALAWAN.
species.notes: Reportedly very common at the summit of Mt Pulgar. Holo destroyed at PNH in Feb-1945, and according to Jebb & Cheek (2001) no extant replicate has been found. This species belongs to the Nepenthes villosa group but is immediately distinguished from the Philippine (Palawan) representatives (Nepenthes mantalingajanensis and Nepenthes mira) by its non-climbing habit, glabrous stems which spread by shoots, much smaller pitchers, relatively narrower peristomes and one-flowered pedicels. 1180-1300m.

species.citation: A.S.Rob. & S.G.Zamudio , Phytotaxa 423 (2019) 22; Type: Zamudio, Apo, Gonzales & Tan 257395 (PNH, holo), Zamudio, Apo, Gonzales & Tan 014747 (UST, iso), Zamudio, Apo, Gonzales & Tan 014749 (UST, iso), Zamudio, Apo, Gonzales & Tan 014753 (UST, iso), Zamudio, Apo, Gonzales & Tan 014754 (UST, iso), Dinagat: Mt Redondo, 839m, 13-Oct-2018.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. DINAGAT.

species.citation: Jebb & Cheek , Eur. J. Taxon. 69 (2013) 14; Type: Fumihiro Konta 12365 (BISH, holo), Mindanao: boundary of Surigao del Sur and Surigao del Norte, Red Hills, SE of Claver, near the northeastern coast, 8-Aug-1978.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Surigao del Norte, Surigao del Sur.

species.citation: S.McPherson, Cervancia, Chi.C.Lee, Jaunzems, Mey & A.S.Rob. , Carniv. Pl. Hab. 2 (2010) 1286.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. PALAWAN.

species.citation: Elmer , LPB 4 (1912) 1494; Type: Elmer 12465 (K, lecto; B, BO, E, MO, NY, U, US, W, iso), Sibuyan: Mt Giting-giting, along Pauala river bottom on sand-gravelly soil, 1000ft, May-1910.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. BOHOL, CAMIGUIN DE BABUYANES (photos), CEBU (photos), DINAGAT (photos), LEYTE, LUZON: Laguna, Mountain Province (photos), Quezon, Sorsogon, Zambales, MARINDUQUE (photos), MINDANAO, MINDORO, PANAY, SAMAR, SIBUYAN.

species.citation: Gronem., Wistuba, V.B.Heinrich, S.McPherson, Mey & Amoroso , Carniv. Pl. Hab. 2 (2010) 1296; Type: V. Amoroso & R. Aspiras s.n. (CMUH00006494, holo): Mindanao: Davao Oriental, Mt Hamiguitan.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Davao Oriental.
species.notes: A stabilized natural hybrid of Nepenthes micramphora and Nepenthes peltata. Terrestrial in partly shaded localities. 1200-1600m.

species.citation: Lagunday & Amoroso , Phytotaxa 689 (2025) 287; Type: Lagunday NEL 023 (PNH, holo; CMUH, iso), Mindanao: Misamis Oriental, Gingoog City, Brgy Eureka, Talangisog, 22-July-2021.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Misamis Oriental.

species.citation: Gronem., Wistuba, Mey & Amoroso , Plants (Basel) 5 (2016) 23; Type: V.B. Amoroso s.n. (CMUH00003606, holo), Mindanao: Davao Oriental, Mt Hamiguitan.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Davao Oriental.

species.citation: Lagunday & Amoroso , Phytotaxa 644 (2024) 164; Type: Lagunday s.n. (PNH, holo; CMUH, iso), Mindanao: Davao de Oro, Maragusan, Mt Kampalili, 6-Aug-2021.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Davao de Oro.

species.citation: Jebb & Cheek , Eur. J. Taxon. 69 (2013) 10 ; Lagunday & Amoroso, Phytotaxa 693 (2005) 88; Type: Gaerlan, Sagcal & Fernando PPI 3274 (BISH, holo; BRIT, iso), Mindanao: Bukidnon, Intavas, Impasug-ong, Mt Kitanglad, 18-Jul-1991.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Bukidnon.

species.citation: S.McPherson, Bourke, Cervancia, Jaunzems & A.S.Rob. , Carniflora Australis 8 (2011) 5; Type: S. McPherson SRM 5 (PPC, holo), Palawan: Narra, close to the summit of Schom-carp Peak, 20-Nov-2010, 1490 m.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. PALAWAN.
species.notes: In stunted montane forest on and below ridge crests, over mafic or ultramafic substrates. 1300-1490m.

species.citation: Jebb & Cheek , Eur. J. Taxon. 69 (2013) 17; Type: Argent, Mendum, Fuentes, R., Belonias, BS 99214 (K, holo; E, PNH, iso), Leyte: Mt Lobi, near Dagami, 7-Nov-1999.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LEYTE.

species.citation: Lagunday & Amoroso , Phytotaxa 693 (2025) 88; Type: Lagunday, NEL 034 (PNH, holo; CMUH, iso), Mindanao: Bukidnon, Mt Kitanglad Range, Mt Maagnaw, Lantapan, 10-Jul-21.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Bukidnon.

species.citation: Lagunday, Acma, V.G.Cabana, Sabas & Amoroso , PJS 146 (2017) 160; Type: N.E Lagunday, M. Acopio, H.C. Armecin, A. Calaguian & N.M. Sabas s.n. (CMUH00009841, holo), Mindanao: Bukidnon, Pantaron range, San Fernando, Mt Malimumu, 1016m, 9-Feb-2014.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Bukidnon.

species.citation: Lagunday, Acma, V.G.Cabana, Sabas & Amoroso , PJS 146 (2017) 161; Type: N.E. Lagunday, M. Acopio & N.M. Sabas s.n. (CMUH00009842, holo), Mindanao: Bukidnon, Pantaron range, San Fernando, Mt Malimumu, 1016m, 9-Feb-2014.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Misamis Oriental (photos).

species.citation: Nerz & Wistuba , Taublatt 59 (2007) 17; Type: Nerz & Wistuba P001 (TUB, holo), cult. from Palawan: Mt Mantalingahan.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. PALAWAN.
species.notes: On ultramafic soils. Separated from Nepenthes mira in the size, shape and absence of indumentum on the pitchers, the operculum that is as wide as the mouth, and the extreme rarity (total absence?) of upper pitchers (both lower and upper pitchers are produced at the same time in mature plants of Nepenthes mira). 1700-2085m.

species.citation: Cheek , PeerJ 8 (2020) e9899: 5; Type: Curran s.n. (PH 01113309, holo; PNH iso. lost), Luzon: Quezon [Tayabas], likely Mt Banahaw, Dec-1911.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Quezon.

species.citation: A.S.Rob., R.Bustam. & Altomonte , Phytotaxa 728 (2025) 95; Type: Collantes & Langbao 1 (PNH, holo; PNH, MEL, iso), Palawan: Brgy Cabayugan, Mount St Paul, 200m, 23-Jun-2023. ≠ Nepenthes campanulata auct. non Kurata ; Clarke et al., Carnivorous Plant Newsletter 43 (2014) 9.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. PALAWAN.

species.citation: Macfarl. , Trans. & Proc. Bot. Soc. Pennsylvania 2 (1911) 207 ; Macfarlane, PJS 33 (1927) 132; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 215; Sh. Kurata & Toyoshima, Gard. Bull. Sing. 26 (1972) 152; Jebb & Cheek, Blumea 42 (1997) 62; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 15 (2001) 99; Elmer, LPB 8 (1915) 2787, as 'merrillii'; Type: FB 7545 Hutchinson (PNH), Dinagat, May-1907, 20m.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. BUCAS GRANDE (photos), DINAGAT, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Bukidnon (photos), Misamis Oriental (photos), Surigao, Surigao del Norte.

species.citation: V.B.Heinrich, S.McPherson, Gronem. & Amoroso , Pitcher Pl. Old World 2 (2009) 1315; Type: V. Amoroso & R. Aspiras s.n. (CMUH00003545, holo), Mindanao: Davao Oriental, Mt Hamiguitan, 1300-1600m, 31-Jan-2005.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Davao Oriental.

species.citation: Sh.Kurata , J. Insectiv. Pl. Soc. 52 (2001) 32 ; Fernando et al., Forest Flora of Dinagat (2017) 69; Brillo et al., Philipp. J. Syst. Biol. 19 (2026) 31; Type: Y. Mino 6838 (Nippon Dental College), Mindanao: Surigao del Sur, Mt Carrascal, 200-300m, 6-Aug-1999. = Nepenthes alata var. ecristata Macfarl. , Pflanzenr. (Engler) IV (111) (1908) 72 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 214.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. DINAGAT, MINDANAO: Bukidnon (photos), Davao Oriental (photos), Davao del Sur (photos), Surigao del Sur.
species.notes: Open scrub on ultramafics, abundant on lateritic soil Separated from Nepenthes alata by the long, rather stiff indumentum on the younger leaves, the pitcher lids which possess very poorly developed to non-existent median keels nor basal appendages, and the dimorphic lid glands. 0-1400m.

species.citation: Jebb & Cheek , Kew Bull. 53 (1998) 966 ; 54 (1999) 891; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 15 (2001) 102; Type: Argent & al. 25438 (K, holo; E, PNH, iso), Palawan: Cleopatra’s Needle, 22-Jan-1998.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. PALAWAN.
species.notes: Submontane forest and grassland on sandstone. 1560-1605m.

species.citation: (Lour.) Druce , Rep. Bot. Soc. Exch. Club Brit. Isles 1916 (1917) 637 ; Merr., Interpret. Herb. Amboin. (1917) 242; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 215; Danser, Bull. Jard. Bot. Cochinch. (1790) 606; ≡ Nepenthes phyllamphora Willd. , Sp. Pl., 4th Ed. 4 (1805) 874 ; Macfarlane, PJS 33 (1927) 135; Type: from Vietnam.

BUCAS GRANDE (photos), DINAGAT (photos), MINDANAO: Agusan del Sur (photos), Lanao del Sur, Surigao, Zamboanga, Zamboanga del Norte (photos), Zamboanga del Sur (photos), ?SAMAR (photos).

species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Davao Oriental.

species.citation: Jebb & Cheek , Nordic J. Bot. 31 (2013) 619; ≡ Nepenthes alata var. biflora Macfarl. , Pflanzenr. (Engler) IV (111) (1908) 72 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 214; Type: Whitford 1537 (according to Jebb & Cheek 2013) or 1723 (according to L.L.Co) (PH, holo; K, iso), Negros: Negros Occidental, Mt Silay, May-1906.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. BILIRAN, NEGROS.

species.notes: In lower and upper montane forest, either terrestrial or epiphytic. 1390m.

species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Surigao del Sur.
species.notes: Montane or submontane forest including Agathis and oak, possibly on ultramafic soil in Surigao. 1450-1900m.

species.citation: Macfarl. , Pflanzenr. (Engler) IV (111) (1908) 43 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 215; Macfarlane, PJS 33 (1927) 130; Jebb & Cheek, Blumea 54 (1999) 888; Fl. species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. BACUIT ISLS (photos), CULION, LINAPACAN, PALAWAN.
species.notes: On scrub over ultramafic soils throughout the southern half of Palawan, Philippines, common. 0-600(-1600)m.

species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Sarangani, South Cotabato (photos).
species.notes: Characterized by its strongly decurrent leaf bases; possibly only a variant of Nepenthes alata. 700-2100m.

species.citation: Nerz , Carniv. Pl. Newslett. 27 (1998) 18 ; Jebb & Cheek, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 15 (2001) 133; Type: P. Mann & T. Smith 051001 (L, holo), Sibuyan: Mt Guiting-guiting, 1300m, growing between Dipteris and high grasses on open slopes, 5-Oct-1996.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. SIBUYAN.
species.notes: In open grasslands on mountain slopes, grows quite sparsely among Dipteris conjugata and high grasses on ultramafic soils. 1250-2058m.

species.citation: Cheek , Pl. Carnivora 36 (2014) 45; ≡ Nepenthes amabilis Wistuba, Gronem., Micheler, Marwinski, Gieray, Coritico & Amoroso , Plants (Basel) 3 (2014) 295, nom. illeg.; Type: T. Gronemeyer & A. Wistuba s.n. (CMUH00008635, holo; CMUH00008637, iso), Mindanao: Misamis Oriental, Claveria, Mt Sumagaya, 19-Aug-2012.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Misamis Oriental.

species.citation: Elmer , LPB 8 (1915) 2785 ; Coritico et al., PJS 151 (2022) 2440; Lagunday & Amoroso, Phytotaxa 666 (2024) 69; Type: Elmer 13705 (NY, iso), Mindanao: Agusan del Norte, Mt Urdaneta, trail from Lake Danao to Masay summit, 1700m, Sep-1912.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Bukidnon, Misamis Oriental, Surigao del Norte.
species.notes: Distinguished from Nepenthes merrilliana by its strongly decurrent leaf bases, hairy pitchers, more rounded, smaller lower pitchers, winged upper pitchers (although absent in some specimens) and different peristome attachment. 700-1700m.

species.citation: Gronem., Coritico, Wistuba, Micheler, Marwinski, Gieray & Amoroso , Plants (Basel) 3 (2014) 292; Type: T. Gronemeyer & F. Coritico s.n. (CMUH00008624, holo), Mindanao: Bukidnon, Pantaron mountain range, Malaybalay City, Brgy St Peter, 15-Aug-2012.

species.notes: Usually on mossy oak forests. It colonises disturbed substrates, making it common in the northern Philippines, particularly in the mountains of Luzon. 600-2000m.
